steps.t: The people of Middlemead can be found throughout the settlement in north-western Kingstead. Mágla of Middlemead has asked that you acquaint yourself w…
Hildulf can be found near the traders' pavilion in southern Middlemead. You have spoken to the people of Middlemead, and should now speak to the trade…
Thane Mágla can be found in the Mead Hall of Middlemead. You have spoken to several inhabitants of Middlemead, and should now return to Mágla.
